title: MineMeow
description: A modpack I like to play with^^
body:
#### There is nothing radically changing the game in this modpack!
There is only mods that allow you to comfortably play minecraft on vanilla servers with such features as
- camera zoom
- sound physics
- particle physics
- new health bar
- improved crosshair
- litematica
- gamma control
- map
- hiding armor 
- and a few more minor mods and optimizations.
#### But I don't take take responsibility that you will not be banned on servers such as hypixel for using this modpack.
#### Note: Just a bunch of mods, no effort was made
